title: Six School of Education faculty, doctoral students awarded prestigious NAEd/Spencer fellowships
summary_en: Six members of the School of Education community have been chosen as recipients of 2026 NAEd/Spencer Dissertation and Postdoctoral Fellowships, prestigious national fellowships that support promising education research by early-career scholars.
title_cn: Six School of Education faculty, doctoral students awarded prestigious NAEd/Spencer fellowships

title: UW–Madison doctoral student Jeong wins first place in national eBoard competition
summary_en: UW–Madison’s Tai Sun Jeong, a PhD student in the Quantitative Methods area in the School of Education’s Department of Educational Psychology, won first place in the 2026 Graduate Student eBoard Competition hosted by the Graduate Student Issues Committee at the National Council on Measurement in Education (NCME) Annual Meeting.
title_cn: UW–Madison doctoral student Jeong wins first place in national eBoard competition

title: More than administrative support: How the Office of Research & Scholarship strengthens faculty research
summary_en: The charge of the Office of Research & Scholarship (ORS) is to equitably support the wide range of research and scholarship underway across the School of Education.
title_cn: More than administrative support: How the Office of Research & Scholarship strengthens faculty research

title: Fong Chan, distinguished UW–Madison scholar in rehabilitation counseling, dies
summary_en: Fong Chan, a professor emeritus at the University of Wisconsin–Madison and leading scholar in the field of rehabilitation counseling, has died.
title_cn: Fong Chan, distinguished UW–Madison scholar in rehabilitation counseling, dies

title: UW–Madison’s Conroy publishes article in Voice and Speech Review
summary_en: UW–Madison’s Colleen Conroy, an assistant professor in the School of Education’s Department of Theatre and Drama, is the author of an article in Voice and Speech Review.
title_cn: UW–Madison’s Conroy publishes article in Voice and Speech Review

title: School of Education graduate receives Ginsberg Family Award
summary_en: Rathika Murali, who graduated in May 2026 from the School of Education, has received a 2026 Ginsberg Family Award from UW–Madison Student Affairs.
title_cn: School of Education graduate receives Ginsberg Family Award
